nodes.label: Profile Photo
nodes.author: Prasetyo Adi Wijonarko
nodes.description: Portrait photograph of a young Southeast Asian male with black hair, wearing a beige/cream linen shirt over a white t-shirt, seated at what appears to be a restaurant or cafe with Japanese-style interior decor. The subject is looking slightly off-camera with a calm expression. This image serves as the personal profile/avatar photo for the portfolio website owner.

properties.subject: young adult male, Southeast Asian appearance
properties.setting: restaurant or cafe interior with Japanese-style decor
properties.attire: beige linen shirt over white t-shirt
